full_text:
Tumor tissue was cut and dissociated using Dispase. For 14.55 mL of AdF+++ medium, I used 300 uL Dispase, and 150 uL DNAse. Incubated in the oven for 30 min; RBC lysis buffer 4 mL + 20 mL of AdF+++ medium. After centrifuge, I resuspended cells in 2 mL of M1 medium, diluted 1:10, and counted the cells.

Assel and Panos performed the tissue dissociation.

Dispase dissociated cells:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 1.45 E6

live: 1.25 E6

viability: 86.6 %

size: 9.9 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 1.64 E6

live: 1.4 E6

viability: 85.5 %

size: 9.9 um

Total cell count: 30.9 E6

Total volume: 2 mL

Overall # of cells in 2 mL was 30.9 E6.

I took 6 E6 cells for long-term organoids seeding, and the rest (24E6) was frozen in 1 mL StemcellBanker (28.05.2024).
